series_metadata.series_description: Manuals, fact sheets, minutes, agendas, proclamation, correspondence, OCF news clips, OCF articles, budget information, applications from vendors who applied for funding.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 2 years, and the Records Center for 3 years, then reviewed by State Archivist before disposal. Shred ; Electronic: Retain in office 2 years, and the Records Center for 3 years, then reviewed by State Archivist before disposal. Erase, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
